svg.title: Normal RAG pipeline — offline schema indexing and online query processing
svg.desc: Two-phase diagram. Top lane: PostgreSQL tables chunked, embedded, stored in pgvector. Bottom lane: user query embedded, similarity searched, sent to LLM, SQL validated and executed.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the information_schema queries to extract all table, column, PK and FK details from PostgreSQL for the RAG pipeline')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot SchemaExtractorService that reads all 17 tables from information_schema.columns, information_schema.table_constraints and returns a list of TableSchemaDto')
sendPrompt('Write the Java buildChunkText method that turns a TableSchemaDto into a descriptive text string with table name, columns with types, PKs, FKs and a business description for embedding')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot EmbeddingService that calls OpenAI text-embedding-3-small API and returns a float[] vector from a chunk text string')
sendPrompt('Write the Flyway SQL migration to create schema_embeddings table with table_name, chunk_text, embedding vector(1536) and ivfflat cosine similarity index using pgvector')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot REST controller POST /api/query that accepts a natural language question and returns SQL results as JSON')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot service method that embeds a user query string using the same OpenAI model used for schema chunks and returns a float[] for pgvector similarity search')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot JdbcTemplate query using pgvector cosine similarity operator <=> to find the top 5 most relevant schema_embeddings rows for a given query vector')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot service that builds a prompt from top-K schema chunks plus the user query and calls Claude API to generate a valid PostgreSQL SELECT statement')
sendPrompt('How do I parse and extract the raw SQL string from Claude API response content blocks in Spring Boot, stripping any markdown code fences?')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot SQL validator that runs EXPLAIN on LLM-generated SQL using JdbcTemplate and throws a ValidationException if it fails, before execution')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot JdbcTemplate execute method that runs the validated SQL with user_id injected for row-level security and returns List<Map<String,Object>> as JSON')
sendPrompt('How do I format and return dynamic SQL query results with unknown column names as a well-typed JSON response from Spring Boot REST API?')

svg.text: security · user_id injected at execute step — generated SQL always scoped to authenticated user
